sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports pain in the right shoulder, describing it as aching and sharp. He reports a headache and denies fever. He reports pain in the left hand. The patient reports shoulder pain. The patient reports pain in the left shoulder. The patient reports pain.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: There is pain to palpation of the acromioclavicular joint. The radial pulse is palpable. Blood pressure is 120/76 mmHg. Heart rate is 82 bpm. Oxygen saturation is 95% on room air. Cervical spine exam reveals no tenderness to palpation.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient has an acute acromioclavicular joint fracture. The patient is experiencing pain.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: I am prescribing meloxicam 15 mg once daily. I am ordering a STAT cat scan of the right shoulder. I am referring the patient to physical therapy for strengthening exercises.
medical_concepts: CT scan of the right shoulder
CT scan of the right shoulder
